'''vakaga''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylohydroquinone|xylohydroquinone]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylohydroquinone|xylohydroquinone]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vakaga
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vækægæth|vækægæth]] || [[word:vækægæj|vækægæj]] || [[word:vækægæsh|vækægæsh]] || [[word:vækægæ|vækægæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakakagath|vakakagath]] || [[word:vakakagaj|vakakagaj]] || [[word:vakakagash|vakakagash]] || [[word:vakakaga|vakakaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakagath|vakagath]] || [[word:vakagaj|vakagaj]] || [[word:vakagash|vakagash]] || [[word:vakaga|vakaga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakafgath|vakafgath]] || [[word:vakafgaj|vakafgaj]] || [[word:vakafgash|vakafgash]] || [[word:vakafgaf|vakafgaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vakagatha|vakagatha]] || [[word:vakagaja|vakagaja]] || [[word:vakagasha|vakagasha]] || [[word:vakagaka|vakagaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vakagath|vakagath]] || [[word:vakagaj|vakagaj]] || [[word:vakagash|vakagash]] || [[word:vakaga|vakaga]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vakagathal|vakagathal]] || [[word:vakagajal|vakagajal]] || [[word:vakagashal|vakagashal]] || [[word:vakagakal|vakagakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vakagathatha|vakagathatha]] || [[word:vakagajaja|vakagajaja]] || [[word:vakagashasha|vakagashasha]] || [[word:vakagaka|vakagaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vakagathan|vakagathan]] || [[word:vakagajan|vakagajan]] || [[word:vakagashan|vakagashan]] || [[word:vakagakan|vakagakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vakagathaoro|vakagathaoro]] || [[word:vakagajaoro|vakagajaoro]] || [[word:vakagashaoro|vakagashaoro]] || [[word:vakagakaoro|vakagakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
